name: Musab Ahmed Khan
title: a Computer Science & Engineering Student
bio: Currently studying at Sabancı University as a CSE undergraduate student with High Honors (CGPA 3.89/4.0). Experienced in full-stack development, ML, AI, NLP, and Data Science. Transitioning into CS for healthcare, recent work includes reliable anatomy-aware segmentation pipeline with uncertainty flagging and xAI-based DeepMyelinAI CDSS for Multiple Sclerosis.
